name: Good Luck Girl!
overview: Ichiko unwittingly absorbs happiness energy from everyone around her. It’s up to the poverty god Momiji to end Ichiko’s positivity consumption and restore the world’s balance.

trailers.title: Good Luck Girl! Binbogami Ga! - Out Now on DVD and Blu-Ray
